I work in the chemical industry and I negotiate with our suppliers.
Right now, I am preparing a new product registration.

I have been a director since 2015.
Hi, I don't think we've met. I'm David Klein, from a packaging company in New Jersey. Is this your first time at the fair?
Nice to meet you, David. I'm Lucimara Ito. I come to New York two or three times a year, but this is my first time at this trade fair.
Welcome. And what do you do?
I'm a director in the chemical industry. I'm responsible for production and regulatory affairs, and I negotiate with our suppliers in China.
That's a long flight. How long have you been in the industry?
I've worked in the chemical industry for twenty years, and I've been a director since 2015. Right now, we're preparing a new product registration.
Interesting. We're actually looking for a new supplier in South America, and I'd love to hear more. Are you taking meetings this week?
Sorry, I didn't catch the last part. Could you say that again, a little more slowly?
Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you say it again more slowly?
Do you mean the meeting on Tuesday?
Could you spell that for me, please?
Let me check I understood. You need the bio by Friday, right?
I'm a director in the chemical industry, and I'm responsible for production.
I've worked in this industry for twenty years.
Right now, I'm preparing a new product registration.
I travel abroad every two or three months, mostly to New York.

Good morning, everyone, and welcome to the International Chemical Trade Fair here in New York. Before we start, a few quick announcements. Registration is open until ten thirty at the main desk, and your badge gives you access to all three halls. The opening panel begins at eleven o'clock in Hall B, and this year we are recording every session, so you can watch it again later. If you are meeting a supplier today, please use the meeting rooms on the second floor. Lunch is served from twelve thirty. And one last thing. If you don't catch a name or a number during a talk, don't worry. The full program is in your bag. Enjoy the fair.

Hi Lucimara, this is Karen Miller from the event office in New York. I'm calling about your registration for September. Everything is confirmed. Your badge is ready and you can collect it at the main desk on the first morning. Two small things. First, we need a short bio, about three sentences. What you do, where you work, and how long you have been in the industry. Second, the organizers are planning a dinner for the international guests on the Tuesday, so please tell me if you are coming. If you have any questions, call me back this week. Thank you, and see you in New York.
